utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each one is fully detailed: the property lists name, address, type, price, status, and accessibility features; financing includes type, funds, mortgage requirement, and timeline; legal_services lists provider, cost, and included items; moving_services lists provider, cost, and included services; setup_services lists multiple utilities with providers, setup fees, and a total estimated fee; total_budget includes all relevant cost breakdowns and a total. All items are fully specified according to the required format.
